pageContext.name: Monkey King in the Sky
pageContext.description: Sideshow and Manas Sum Inc. are proud to present the Monkey King in the Sky Statue from the acclaimed role-playing game, Asura Online!  Based on the classic Chinese tale Journey to the West, the massively multiplayer online game features the demigod Monkey King, captured in beautiful detail here in this hand-painted resin statue by the artisans at Manas Sum.  Start your journey into the fantastic and supernatural world of Asura Online by adding the Monkey King to your collection today!
